title: selaginella commutata
intro: Selaginella commutata, also known as spikemoss or spike moss, is a type of evergreen perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to create herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer health benefits like reducing fever, soothing respiratory problems, and alleviating digestive issues. In addition, Selaginella commutata has been used in traditional medicine to treat conditions like bronchitis, coughs, and colds, making it a popular herbal remedy among natural health practitioners.
